channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ex-NFL star Eddie Lacy's blood alcohol level allegedly four times over legal limit during arrest: report
item.description: Police in Arizona reportedly made a traffic stop Sept. 30 that resulted in multiple DUI charges against Eddie Lacy after a 911 caller attempted "to locate a possible impaired driver.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kyle Larson opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs as the title favorite
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Kyle Larson has been lucky of late in Las Vegas, where he opens the third round of NASCAR's playoffs on top of the Cup Series standings and the favorite to win Sunday's race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arsenal stunned by Bournemouth and Garnacho sparks Man United comeback
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Arsenal blew the chance to go top of the English Premier League after a shock 2-0 loss to Bournemouth on Saturday. In one of the biggest upsets of the burgeoning season, 10-man Arsenal lost for the first time.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 16 Indiana routs Nebraska 56-7 to stay unbeaten; Rourke injures hand and misses 2nd half
item.description: Justice Ellison ran for 105 yards and two first-half touchdowns and No. 16 Indiana continued its best start in 57 years with a 56-7 rout of Nebraska, matching the Hoosiers’ most lopsided Big Ten win in program history.
item.dc:creator: Phillip B. Wilson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Verstappen wins US Grand Prix sprint race to earn 1st win of any kind since June and stretch lead
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Red Bull's Max Verstappen won the United States Grand Prix sprint race Saturday to earn his first victory of any kind in nearly four months and keep McLaren's Lando Norris from chipping away at his lead in the Formula 1 season championship.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area high school football roundup 2024: Best of Week 8 action
item.description: Acalanes, California, Liberty, Santa Teresa, Willow Glen, Campolindo, Piedmont Hills, Northgate, Saratoga, Gunn among winners on eighth weekend of the high school football season
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: How to watch the 49ers vs. Chiefs on Sunday
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers take on the Kansas City Chiefs at 1:25 p.m. PDT on Sunday, Oct. 20 at Levi's Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: What to know before San Jose State kicks off against Wyoming
item.description: San Jose State Spartans look to bounce back and resume drive for bowl eligibility in Mountain West home game.
item.dc:creator: Christian Vieyra, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU wins last second thriller over Oklahoma State, 38-35
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The dream season for BYU continues. Jake Retzlaff threw a 35-yard touchdown pass to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left and No. 13 BYU remained undefeated, outlasting Oklahoma State 38-35 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vikings fan Tim Walz discusses security concerns about his Lambeau visit, praises head coach Kevin O'Connell
item.description: Democratic Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz delivered high praise for Vikings head coach Kevin O'Connell, who has led the Vikings to a 5-0 record.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tony Bennett cites NIL and transfer portal era as reason he's suddenly retiring at Virginia
item.description: CHARLOTTESVILLE, Va. (AP) — Describing himself as “a square peg in a round hole,” a tearful Tony Bennett said Friday he suddenly retired from coaching at Virginia because he wasn’t suited to navigate the current landscape of college basketball.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bally Sports' parent company, FanDuel partner for regional sports networks rebrand
item.description: The days of Bally Sports are numbered as the network's parent company struck a deal with sports betting giant FanDuel to rename the RSNs to the FanDuel Sports Network.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GJ Tigers soccer downs Central, inches closer to league title
item.description: In a big southwestern league soccer showdown at Community Hospital Unity Field, the Grand Junction Tigers stayed hot.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Ionescu's 3-pointer with 1 second left gives Liberty 80-77 win over Lynx and 2-1 lead in WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Sabrina Ionescu watched Breanna Stewart carry the New York Liberty all game, until it was time to win it. Then the ball was hers. “In the timeout, (coach) Sandy (Brondello) was like, ‘You’re going to shoot the shot,'" Ionescu said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Montrose volleyball picks up huge league win over Fruita
item.description: It took all five sets to decide a battle between two of the Southwestern League's best on the volleyball court.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bills acquire wide receiver Amari Cooper from Browns, giving QB Josh Allen a much-needed playmaker
item.description: Amari Cooper went from a fading No. 1 wide receiver in Cleveland to a top one with Buffalo. Looking to add a playmaker for quarterback Josh Allen, the Bills acquired Cooper on Tuesday in a trade with the skidding Browns, whose season seems to be unraveling by the week with the NFL’s worst offense.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Royals keep playoff hopes alive with 3-0 win over Seattle
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In the second to last home game of the season, the Utah Royals kept their playoff hopes alive for another week, beating the Seattle Reign 3-0 off of a Cloe Lacasse hat trick.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bears vs. Jaguars: Teams battling in early-morning tilt at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Jaguars have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. Inactives for the Bears are DB Jaquan Brisker, DB Tyrique Stevenson, OL Nate Davis, DL Zacch Pickens, WR Velus Jones Jr., DB Terrell Smith and DL Dominque Robinson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
